sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66390" key="mesh/eis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσ-ήεις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εσσα</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εν</itype>, <sense id="n66390.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">middling</tr_> (between <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔξοχος</foreign> and <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χερειότερος</foreign>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0012.tlg002.perseus-grc1:11:12:269" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.12.269</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
